title: pulmonaria rubra subsp. filarszkyana
intro: Pulmonaria rubra subsp. filarszkyana, also known as Lungwort, is a type of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to promote health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal medicine, Pulmonaria rubra subsp. filarszkyana is often used to treat respiratory conditions, including pneumonia and tuberculosis, as well as to reduce fever and promote wound healing.
